verifications_disabled_message.label: Verifications disabled message
verifications_disabled_message.helpText: Shown to users in this subreddit when submissions are turned off. If cleared, the app falls back to the built-in default message.
verifications_disabled_message.defaultValue: Verifications are temporarily disabled.  Please check back soon.

max_denials_before_block.label: Max denials before auto-block
max_denials_before_block.helpText: Users are automatically blocked in this subreddit after reaching this many denied verification submissions. Enter 0 to disable auto-block, or a whole number of 2 or greater.

auto_flair_reconcile_enabled.label: Automatically repair verification flair
auto_flair_reconcile_enabled.helpText: When enabled the app checks approved users' flair when they open the hub (no more than once every 24 hours). If the verification flair was removed or changed the app attempts to restore it. Existing flair that still matches the configured CSS class will not be replaced.

show_photo_instructions_before_submit.label: Show photo instructions before verification submission
show_photo_instructions_before_submit.helpText: When enabled users see the configured Photo Instructions after clicking "Submit Verification" and before uploading photos. If no instructions are configured the user proceeds directly to the acknowledgement screen and photo upload.

settings_tab_requires_config_access.label: Restrict Settings tab to mods with config/settings access
settings_tab_requires_config_access.helpText: When enabled, only moderators with config/settings access can see and use the Settings tab in the moderator panel. Review queue access is unchanged.

mod_menu_audit_purge_days.label: Purge audit log data older than (days)
mod_menu_audit_purge_days.helpText: Used by the subreddit menu action "Purge Audit Log." Enter 0 to purge all audit log entries.

deny_reason_1_label.label: Denial reason 1 label
deny_reason_1_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.

deny_reason_2_label.label: Denial reason 2 label
deny_reason_2_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.

deny_reason_3_label.label: Denial reason 3 label
deny_reason_3_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.

deny_reason_4_label.label: Denial reason 4 label
deny_reason_4_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.
